source_message: Oracle OOS 06-17: NO-TRADE on PRICE QUALITY (not bias). Bias ~2/3 bearish (daily bull FVG inverted w/ displacement, 4H fresh bear FVG, NY-open bear MSS 10:00), but range normal/two-sided (sold to 30384, bounced ~85% to 30509, ground to 30359), all structure internal-tier (no swing-tier), neither candidate entry clean (10:00 MSS whipsawed +120; 10:25 retrace-short ground 40min). No clean fast entry + choppy two-sided quality = stand aside (Pillar 2/3 veto).
